channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Twisha Sharma cremated in Bhopal as investigation continues after second AIIMS postmortem
item.description: The last rites of former model and actor Twisha Sharma were conducted on Sunday evening at Bhadbhada Ghat in Bhopal after a second postmortem examination was carried out by a four-member medical team ...

item.title: Halifax police search for missing newborn after woman found in life-threatening condition
item.description: Halifax Regional Police have launched an urgent search for a missing newborn baby after a woman was discovered in hospital in life-threatening condition, appearing to have recently given birth. Accord...

item.title: Bordeaux retain Champions Cup title with dominant win over Leinster as Bielle-Biarrey stars with two tries
item.description: Bordeaux secured back-to-back European Champions Cup titles after delivering a commanding 41-19 victory over Leinster in the final on Saturday, extending French dominance in the competition for a sixt...

item.title: Johanna Matz, Beloved Star of 1950s Austrian Cinema, Dies at 93
item.description: Johanna Matz (1932–2025) was a prominent figure in German-language cinema during the 1950s, widely remembered for her radiant presence and “girl next door” appeal. Trained as a dancer at Vienna’s pres...

item.title: Soundtrack details revealed for Apple TV+ series ‘Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed’
item.description: Apple TV+ has launched its new dark comedy series ‘Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed’, created by David J. Rosen and starring Tatiana Maslany and Jake Johnson. The series follows Paula Saunders, a divorced ...

item.title: Strong buyer competition drives multi-million dollar sales in Narrabundah’s family home market
item.description: Narrabundah’s property market in Canberra’s Inner South continues to show strong momentum, with limited housing stock and sustained buyer demand pushing prices higher for well-located family homes. Re...

item.title: Kano State includes inmates, HIV and hypertensive patients in expanded health insurance scheme
item.description: The Kano State Contributory Healthcare Management Agency (KSCHMA) has expanded its health insurance coverage to include vulnerable groups such as inmates in correctional centres, people living with HI...

item.title: Maggie Smith’s Early Stage Role in the 1960 Play 'Strip the Willow'
item.description: In 1960, a 25-year-old Maggie Smith appeared in the stage production “Strip the Willow,” a play that would later be seen as an important early milestone in her rise to international fame. The work was...

item.title: Miley Cyrus honoured with star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame during emotional ceremony
item.description: Miley Cyrus was awarded a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame during a ceremony held on 22 May 2026 in Los Angeles. The singer, who became the 2,845th person to receive the honour, was accompanied by a...

item.title: Queen Temi-T to host ‘The Hero Within’ Children’s Day 2026 celebration in Lagos
item.description: Queen Temitope Chikezie, popularly known as Queen Temi-T, is set to return with another major Children’s Day celebration tagged “The Hero Within with Queen Temi-T”, scheduled for May 26, 2026, at the ...

item.title: Home Affairs reports over 109,000 arrests and deportations of undocumented foreigners between 2021 and 2026
item.description: Home affairs minister Leon Schreiber has revealed that 109,735 undocumented foreign nationals were arrested and deported in South Africa over the past five financial years, spanning 2021/2022 to 2025/...

item.title: Editorial cartoon highlights for 25 May 2026
item.description: This article presents a curated selection of editorial cartoons published around 25 May 2026. Rather than reporting on a single news event, the piece functions as a visual roundup of political and soc...

item.title: Arsenal Premier League trophy presentation to be delayed after Crystal Palace match due to post-match ceremonies
item.description: Arsenal’s long-awaited Premier League title celebration will not happen immediately after their final match against Crystal Palace, as the club will have to wait around 30 minutes before officially re...

item.title: Hawks arrest Gauteng woman linked to Eastern Cape human trafficking investigation
item.description: A 30-year-old woman has been arrested by the Hawks in Johannesburg in connection with serious allegations of human trafficking and commercial sexual exploitation linked to a property in the Eastern Ca...

item.title: Experts report rising hip damage and increased hip replacement surgeries among young Indians after Covid-19
item.description: Medical experts in India have reported a significant rise in hip-related complications and surgical interventions among younger and middle-aged adults in the post-Covid period. At the 2nd DELHI HIP 36...

item.title: Two tourists shot dead in Kruger National Park as authorities launch investigation
item.description: Two foreign tourists have been reported killed in a shooting incident at South Africa’s famous Kruger National Park, according to local authorities. Police say the victims died during a violent confro...

item.title: Portraits and Career Highlights of Denzel Washington During the 1980s
item.description: The article presents a retrospective look at actor Denzel Washington during the 1980s, combining biographical information with highlights from his early acting career. It begins by outlining Washingto...

item.title: NDLEA intercepts major drug shipments, arrests foreign suspect at Lagos airport and seizes opioids worth billions
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) carried out multiple anti-drug operations across Nigeria, leading to the arrest of a 63-year-old Chinese woman, Ting Hung Kiong, at the Murtala Muhamme...

item.title: How to sleep better during a heatwave as temperatures peak in the UK
item.description: The article discusses how rising temperatures across the United Kingdom are affecting people’s ability to sleep comfortably during an intense spell of warm weather. As forecasters warn of exceptional ...

item.title: Three people hospitalized following vehicle crash in Scarborough
item.description: A vehicle collision in Scarborough, Toronto, left three people hospitalized on May 24, 2026. According to the report published by CTV News Toronto, emergency crews responded to the crash early Sunday ...
